productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Gfx Rev 2l Sho Red Shorts
description: Composition Red shorts made of 100% polyester Climalite fabric, with an elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, black mesh lining, black stripe panels on the side seams and printed graphic and brand name towards the left leg hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Do not dry clean Made of ClimaLite fabric, these adidas shorts are ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. The ClimaLite wicks moisture from the skin to the fabrics surface for easy evaporation and the mesh lining makes it more breathable. Pair it with sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31"
